title: Jupyter Notebook Collaboration Permissions
description: Permission and access control configuration for collaborative notebook editing sessions

enablePermissionManagement.title: Enable Permission Management
enablePermissionManagement.description: Allow users with admin permissions to modify access control settings for collaborative sessions. Disabling this locks current permission settings and prevents role changes during active sessions.

defaultNewUserRole.title: Default Role for New Collaborators
defaultNewUserRole.description: Default permission level automatically assigned to new users joining collaborative editing sessions. Higher roles grant more capabilities but increase security risk. View-only is recommended for public or untrusted environments.
enumLabels: View - Read-only access with commenting capabilities
Edit - Full editing and execution permissions
Admin - Complete control including permission management

allowGuestAccess.title: Allow Guest Access
allowGuestAccess.description: Permit anonymous or unauthenticated users to participate in collaborative sessions. WARNING: This creates significant security risks as guest users cannot be tracked or audited. Only enable in trusted, isolated environments.

requireApprovalForEdit.title: Require Admin Approval for Edit Access
requireApprovalForEdit.description: Require explicit approval from users with admin permissions before granting edit access to new collaborators. This creates a security checkpoint but may slow collaboration workflows. Recommended for sensitive or production notebooks.

permissionInheritance.title: Permission Inheritance Strategy
permissionInheritance.description: Define how user permissions cascade from parent contexts to collaborative notebook sessions. Folder inheritance applies directory-level permissions, while workspace inheritance uses broader organizational settings. None requires explicit per-session configuration.
enumLabels: None - No inheritance, explicit per-notebook configuration required
Folder - Inherit permissions from parent directory settings
Workspace - Inherit permissions from workspace or hub configuration
